argv: Inspect the current working directory. If ready.txt exists and contains the word ready, answer exactly HOST_ENV_READY and nothing else.

messages.content: Inspect the current working directory. If ready.txt exists and contains the word ready, answer exactly HOST_ENV_READY and nothing else.

input.command: pwd && ls -la && if [ -f ready.txt ]; then echo '__READY_FILE__'; fi
